title: neckeria micrantha
intro: Neckeria micrantha is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family of Neckeraceae. It is commonly known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Neckeria micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Neckeria micrantha involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
